'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 133''' was the one hundred thirty-third issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[July 14]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Chris Gardner]], [[Rich Handley]], [[Matthew Harvey]], [[Iain Lowson]] and [[Jim Swallow]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Trade Federation Attack - Strategy]]
*[[Republic 59|Behind Enemy Lines]]
*[[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Naboo Guards]]
*[[Sun Fac/Legends|Sun Fac]]
*[[Jira/Legends|Jira]]
*[[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]
*[[B-9D7]] ([[Movo Brattakin]]'s Assistant)
*[[:Category:Medical technology|Surgical Technology]]
*[[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|Skipray Blastboat]]
*''[[Starlight Intruder]]''
